title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXII. Scholastic.
content:
Come when you're called,
            Do what you're bid,
        Shut the door after you,
            Never be chid.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXII. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
